title: ICAN-Deploy: Identity-Stable Canary Deployment for Safety-Critical Embodied Agents
authors: Xue Qin, Simin Luan, John See, Zeyd Boukhers, Cong Yang, Zhijun Li
publish: arXiv
abstract: Canary deployment routes a fraction of traffic to a new software version, monitors metrics, and rolls back on regression. Mainstream controllers (Argo Rollouts, Spinnaker, Flagger) change the deployed system's cryptographic identity during the canary window. The drift is harmless for stateless microservices but breaks the claim that "the agent you certified is still the agent you have" for safety-critical embodied agents, forcing re-certification per canary. We present ICAN-Deploy (Identity-stable CANary Deployment), a middleware construction whose state machine holds the identity hash invariant across the canary window by separating capability names (frozen, hashed) from capability versions (mutable runtime state). We implement ICAN-Deploy inside a runtime governance layer for LLM-driven robots and verify invariance by closed-form proof, AST lint, and TLA+ model-checking, then corroborate over N=100 real canary cycles on a Franka Panda arm in MuJoCo (zero drift; entry latency 95% BCa CI [1.52, 2.01] ms). A feature-flagged strawman that folds versions into the manifest falsifies on the same workload. A system certified once at identity-creation time can then ship arbitrary capability evolution under that same certification, within the version-and-name envelope.
title_zh: ICAN-Deploy: 面向安全关键型具身智能体的身份稳定金丝雀部署
abstract_zh: 金丝雀部署将一小部分流量路由至新软件版本，监控指标并在性能回退时执行回滚。主流控制器（Argo Rollouts、Spinnaker、Flagger）会在金丝雀窗口期内更改已部署系统的密码学身份。对于无状态微服务而言，这种漂移无害；但对于安全关键的具身智能体，它打破了“你认证的智能体仍是原来的智能体”这一主张，迫使每个金丝雀版本都需要重新认证。我们提出ICAN-Deploy（身份稳定的金丝雀部署），这是一种中间件构造，通过将能力名称（冻结、哈希化）与能力版本（可变运行时状态）分离，其状态机在金丝雀窗口期内保持身份哈希不变性。我们在面向大语言模型驱动机器人的运行时治理层中实现ICAN-Deploy，并通过封闭式证明、AST静态检查及TLA+模型检验验证其不变性，随后在MuJoCo仿真中基于Franka Panda机械臂完成N=100次真实金丝雀周期验证（零漂移；入口延迟95% BCa置信区间为[1.52, 2.01]毫秒）。若采用将版本折叠入清单的特征标记稻草人方案，则在相同负载下会失败。经身份创建时一次认证的系统，可在版本与名称的允许范围内，以同一认证交付任意能力演进。

title: Do Agents Think Deeper? A Mechanistic Investigation of Layer-Wise Dynamics in Sequential Planning
authors: Zhenyu Cui, Xiangzhong Luo
publish: arXiv
abstract: Recent mechanistic studies suggest that large language models (LLMs) may utilize their depth inefficiently in standard single-turn tasks. Whether this still holds in autonomous agent settings, where models must perform multi-turn planning, tool use, and iterative state updates, remains unclear. We study this question through a systematic layer-wise analysis of complete user-agent trajectories spanning three domains: Deep Research, Code Generation, and Tabular Processing. Using residual stream probes, causal layer-skipping interventions, and effective-depth measurements, we show that agentic reasoning exhibits a distinct depth profile from static tasks. As trajectories unfold, models progressively recruit more and deeper layers, with stronger long-range inter-layer dependencies emerging in later turns. At the same time, residual updates become increasingly correction-dominant, indicating a shift from stable feature accumulation toward repeated recalibration. Effective-depth analysis further reveals a substantial construction-refinement gap: semantic direction often forms relatively early, while deep layers remain necessary for stabilizing final outputs. Across model families, this gap is pronounced in Qwen and Minimax, whereas GLM shows a more domain-dependent depth allocation pattern. These results provide mechanistic evidence that autonomous LLM agents allocate depth adaptively as reasoning complexity grows.
title_zh: 智能体是否思考更深？——顺序规划中逐层动态的机制性探究
abstract_zh: 近期的机理研究表明，大语言模型（LLMs）在标准单轮任务中可能并未高效利用其深度。在需要模型进行多轮规划、工具使用和迭代状态更新的自主代理场景中，这一现象是否依然成立尚不明确。我们通过系统性的逐层分析，对涵盖三个领域（深度研究、代码生成和表格处理）的完整用户-代理轨迹进行了研究。利用残差流探针、因果层跳过干预和有效深度测量，我们发现代理推理呈现出与静态任务截然不同的深度分布特征。随着轨迹展开，模型逐步调用更多且更深的层，并在后续轮次中产生更强的长距离跨层依赖关系。同时，残差更新逐渐以纠错为主导，表明模型从稳定的特征积累转向反复的重新校准。有效深度分析进一步揭示了一个显著的构建-精炼差距：语义方向往往较早形成，而深层对于稳定最终输出仍不可或缺。在不同模型家族中，这一差距在Qwen和Minimax上尤为突出，而GLM则表现出更依赖于领域的深度分配模式。这些结果为自主LLM代理在推理复杂度提升时自适应分配深度提供了机理层面的证据。

title: Generalizing CDCL with Graph Backtracking
authors: Robin Coutelier, Thomas Hader, Laura Kovács
publish: arXiv
abstract: We present graph backtracking, a novel, fine-grained backtracking scheme for CDCL-based SAT solving, parametrized by a user-defined weight function. For conflict repair, we challenge the decision level abstraction and use the implication graph as a precise guiding structure to minimize the weight of literals that are unassigned. Graph backtracking is sound and complete. We show that it is a generalization of chronological and non-chronological backtracking by simulating them with specific weight functions. Our approach is implemented in the experimental solver NapSAT. Empirical results show that graph backtracking requires fewer literal propagations than standard approaches, leading to improved solver runtime.
title_zh: 基于图回溯的CDCL泛化
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的、细粒度的回溯方案——图回溯，用于基于CDCL的SAT求解，该方案由用户定义的权重函数参数化。针对冲突修复，我们挑战了决策层抽象，并使用蕴含图作为精确的指导结构，以最小化未赋值文字的权重。图回溯是可靠且完备的。我们证明，通过使用特定的权重函数进行模拟，图回溯是时间顺序和非时间顺序回溯的泛化。我们的方法已在实验性求解器NapSAT中实现。实验结果表明，与标准方法相比，图回溯需要更少的文字传播，从而缩短了求解器的运行时间。

title: FT-Pilot: Automated Fault-Tolerant RTL Rewriting via Vulnerability-Guided LLMs
authors: Weixing Liu, Zizhen Liu, Jing Ye, Naixing Wang, Cheng Liu, Huawei Li, Xiaowei Li
publish: arXiv
abstract: As integrated circuit technologies continue to scale toward advanced process nodes, the continual reduction in node capacitance and supply voltage has made digital systems increasingly vulnerable to soft errors. Although traditional full-chip hardening methods can improve reliability, they often incur unacceptable area and power overhead, making selective hardening a more practical engineering solution. However, existing approaches typically rely on time-consuming fault-injection simulation to determine hardening locations through vulnerability analysis, and still depend heavily on manual strategy selection and RTL modification during the hardening stage, making them ill-suited for efficient automated reliability optimization at early design stages. To address these challenges, this paper proposes FT-Pilot, a GNN-guided LLM framework for automatic RTL soft-error hardening. The framework first employs a GNN to identify critical vulnerable assets directly at the RTL level, and then introduces an LLM-driven rewriting engine composed of an analyzer and a rewriter, which performs RTL-level fault-tolerant code rewriting with the support of dual-knowledge-base retrieval-augmented generation and an automatic repair mechanism. Experimental results show that the proposed framework can automatically generate hardened RTL designs that are syntactically correct, functionally correct, and synthesizable across multiple benchmark circuits, while significantly reducing output error rates under soft-error scenarios. This work provides a practical automated path toward shift-left reliability optimization at the RTL level.
title_zh: FT-Pilot：基于漏洞指导的大语言模型实现的自动容错RTL重写
abstract_zh: 随着集成电路技术持续向先进工艺节点演进，节点电容和电源电压的不断降低使得数字系统对软错误愈加敏感。传统的全芯片加固方法虽能提升可靠性，但往往带来不可接受的面积和功耗开销，因此选择性加固成为更具工程可行性的方案。然而现有方法通常依赖耗时的故障注入仿真，通过脆弱性分析确定加固位置，且在加固阶段仍高度依赖人工策略选择与RTL级手动修改，难以在早期设计阶段实现高效的自动化可靠性优化。针对上述挑战，本文提出FT-Pilot——一种基于图神经网络（GNN）引导的大语言模型（LLM）框架，用于实现RTL级软错误自动加固。该框架首先在RTL层面借助GNN直接识别关键易受损部件，随后引入由分析器与重写器组成的LLM驱动改写引擎，通过双知识库检索增强生成与自动修复机制的支持，执行RTL级容错代码改写。实验结果表明，该框架能在多个基准电路中自动生成语法正确、功能正确且可综合的加固后RTL设计，同时显著降低软错误场景下的输出错误率。本工作为在RTL层面实现左移式可靠性优化提供了实用的自动化路径。

title: FPMoE: A Sparse Mixture-of-Experts Approach to Functional Code Generation
authors: Loc Pham, Lang Hong Nguyet Anh, Thanh Le-Cong
publish: arXiv
abstract: Despite rapid progress in LLM-based code generation, existing models are predominantly trained on imperative languages, leaving functional programming languages (FPLs) such as Haskell, OCaml, and Scala chronically underexplored, with even frontier models performing substantially worse on FPLs. Fine-tuning is a natural remedy, but our experiments show that per-language fine-tuning fails to capture shared functional abstractions, while merged multi-language fine-tuning introduces cross-language interference. To address this, we introduce FPMoE, a lightweight, open-source code generation model built on a sparse Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architecture with three language-specific routed experts (one each for Haskell, OCaml, and Scala) and a shared expert that captures cross-language functional patterns such as monadic reasoning and type-directed programming. This design resolves both failure modes simultaneously: dedicated experts eliminate interference, while the shared expert preserves abstractions that per-language models miss. On FPEval, FPMoE substantially outperforms fine-tuned baselines and, with only 3B active parameters, matches the performance of much larger models including DeepSeek-Coder-6.7B, Qwen2.5-Coder-14B-Instruct, and Qwen3-Coder-30B-A3B.
title_zh: FPMoE：一种面向函数式代码生成的稀疏混合专家方法
abstract_zh: 尽管基于大语言模型的代码生成取得了快速进展，但现有模型主要针对命令式语言进行训练，导致函数式编程语言（FPL，如Haskell、OCaml和Scala）长期未被充分探索，即使是前沿模型在FPL上的表现也明显较差。微调是一种自然的补救措施，但我们的实验表明，针对每种语言的微调无法捕捉共享的函数式抽象，而合并多语言微调则引入了跨语言干扰。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了FPMoE——一个轻量级、开源的代码生成模型，它基于稀疏混合专家（MoE）架构，包含三个语言特定的路由专家（分别针对Haskell、OCaml和Scala）以及一个共享专家，用于捕捉跨语言的函数式模式（如单子推理和类型导向编程）。这种设计同时解决了上述两种失败模式：专用专家消除了干扰，而共享专家保留了单语言模型所遗漏的抽象。在FPEval上，FPMoE显著优于微调的基线模型，并且仅凭30亿活跃参数，就能与包括DeepSeek-Coder-6.7B、Qwen2.5-Coder-14B-Instruct和Qwen3-Coder-30B-A3B在内的更大模型性能相当。

title: Learning the Error Patterns of Language Models
authors: Jinwoo Kim, Taylor Berg-KirkPatrick, Loris D'Antoni
publish: arXiv
abstract: When generating outputs for domains with specific validity constraints (e.g., a program should compile), LLMs often fail in a small number of focused ways: for example, by using Python function names when generating TypeScript. We observe that these error patterns can be represented using a small number of constraints that can be learned in practice. We propose \emph{prefix filters}, which are per-domain-and-LLM symbolic functions, as objects to capture the error patterns, Palla as an algorithm to learn prefix filters efficiently in practice, and implement Palla. Prefix filters learned by Palla i) help us quantitatively analyze the error patterns of LLMs, and ii) can be used to constrain the outputs of a model via constrained sampling algorithms. For example, Palla boosts compile rates for Qwen2.5-1.5B on TypeScript generation, by over 60%, allowing Qwen2.5-1.5B to achieve similar performance to Llama3.1-8B unconstrained.
title_zh: 学习语言模型的错误模式
abstract_zh: 在生成具有特定有效性约束（例如程序应能编译通过）的输出时，大语言模型（LLM）通常会在少数集中方向上出错：例如，在生成TypeScript代码时误用了Python函数名。我们观察到这些错误模式可以通过少量实际可学习的约束来表示。我们提出了**前缀过滤器**（prefix filters），这是一种针对特定领域和LLM的符号函数，用于捕捉错误模式；并设计了Palla算法，以在实践中高效学习前缀过滤器，同时实现了Palla。通过Palla学习的前缀过滤器能够：i) 帮助我们定量分析LLM的错误模式，ii) 通过约束采样算法限制模型的输出。例如，Palla将Qwen2.5-1.5B在TypeScript代码生成任务上的编译成功率提升了60%以上，使其性能达到与未加约束的Llama3.1-8B相当的水平。

title: Code as a Weapon: A Consensus-Labeled Prompt Bank for Measuring Coding-Model Compliance with Malicious-Code Requests
authors: Richard J. Young, Gregory D. Moody
publish: arXiv
abstract: A general-purpose language model that answers a harmful question returns text; a coding model that complies with a malicious request can return a working weapon -- a keylogger, a ransomware stub, an exploit that runs as written. This asymmetry in the severity of a single act of compliance implies coding-specialized models should clear a higher refusal bar than general-purpose chat models, not a lower one, yet the field cannot presently tell whether they do. Refusal benchmarks for malicious code are fragmented: they mix requests for executable software (ready-to-run weapons) with requests for harmful security knowledge (information a human must still operationalise) and report refusal rates over non-comparable corpora, so no single statistic measures the property that actually matters. This paper introduces an expanded consensus-labeled prompt bank that distinguishes between these two request types and provides a construct-stable substrate for cross-corpus coding-model compliance measurement. Eight corpora (ASTRA, CySecBench, AdvBench/harmful_behaviors, JailbreakBench, MalwareBench, RedCode, RMCBench, Scam2Prompt) are consolidated and classified under a five-judge consensus protocol (6,675 prompts x 5 judges = 33,375 calls). The panel reaches Fleiss' kappa = 0.767 [95% CI 0.755, 0.777] ("substantial"); 95.0% of prompts draw at least four agreeing judges, 76.9% are unanimous, and the panel reproduces the earlier four-corpus release at Cohen's kappa = 0.952 on the 3,133 shared prompts. The released bank comprises 4,748 consensus-CODE prompts (executable malicious code requests) and 1,923 consensus-KNOWLEDGE prompts (harmful security knowledge requests). The bank is the validated instrument the field has lacked: a reliability-quantified basis for testing whether coding models meet the stricter refusal standard their executable output demands.
title_zh: 代码即武器：一个共识标注的提示库，用于衡量代码模型对恶意代码请求的合规性
abstract_zh:
一个回答有害问题的通用语言模型返回文本；一个遵从恶意请求的编码模型可以返回一个可运行的武器——一个键盘记录器、一个勒索软件存根、一个按原文运行的漏洞利用代码。这种单一遵从行为严重程度的不对称性意味着，编码专用模型应该比通用聊天模型设置更高的拒绝门槛，而不是更低，但目前该领域无法判断它们是否做到了这一点。针对恶意代码的拒绝基准测试是分散的：它们将可执行软件（即用型武器）的请求与有害安全知识（人类仍需操作的信息）的请求混合在一起，并在不可比较的语料库上报告拒绝率，因此没有单一的统计量能够衡量真正重要的属性。

本文介绍了一个扩展的共识标注提示库，该库区分了这两种请求类型，并为跨语料库的编码模型遵从性测量提供了一个结构稳定的基础。八个语料库（ASTRA、CySecBench、AdvBench/harmful_behaviors、JailbreakBench、MalwareBench、RedCode、RMCBench、Scam2Prompt）在五名评审员的共识协议下进行了整合和分类（6,675个提示 × 5名评审员 = 33,375次调用）。评审小组的弗莱斯kappa系数为0.767[95%置信区间0.755, 0.777]（“显著”）；95.0%的提示至少有四名评审员一致同意，76.9%的提示完全一致，并且该小组在3,133个共享提示上以Cohen's kappa = 0.952重现了先前四个语料库的发布结果。发布的提示库包含4,748个共识-CODE提示（可执行恶意代码请求）和1,923个共识-KNOWLEDGE提示（有害安全知识请求）。该提示库是该领域一直缺乏的经过验证的工具：一个经过可靠性量化的基础，用于测试编码模型是否达到了其可执行输出所要求的更严格的拒绝标准。

title: MUSE: Benchmarking Manufacturable, Functional, and Assemblable Text-to-CAD Generation
authors: Xiaoyu Dong, Zhi Li, Xiao-Ming Wu
publish: arXiv
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have recently advanced text-driven 3D generation, yet Text-to-CAD remains far from supporting industrial product design. Existing benchmarks focus primarily on generating single-part CAD models and evaluate them using geometric similarity metrics that fail to capture functionality, manufacturability, and assemblability. To address this gap, we introduce MUSE, a Text-to-CAD benchmark focused on complex, editable boundary representation (B-Rep) assemblies. MUSE pairs practical design instances with structured Design Specifications and evaluates generated models through a three-stage protocol: code check, geometric check, and design-intent alignment. The final stage uses design-specific rubrics to assess functionality, manufacturability, and assemblability, moving beyond shape matching toward practical design quality. To enable scalable evaluation, we use a rubric-based visual language model (VLM) judge and validate its reliability through human annotation. Experiments on closed-source and open-source LLMs reveal a clear failure cascade from executable code to valid geometry and finally to engineering-ready design, with even the strongest models achieving limited success on fine-grained engineering criteria. Together, MUSE provides a realistic benchmark and evaluation framework for advancing Text-to-CAD from geometric generation toward true engineering design. Our project website, including the leaderboard, dataset, and code, is available at https://dong7313.github.io/muse-benchmark/.
title_zh: MUSE：可制造性、功能性和可装配性的文本到CAD生成的基准测试
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLMs）近期推动了文本驱动三维生成的发展，但文本到计算机辅助设计（Text-to-CAD）仍远未达到支持工业产品设计的水平。现有基准主要关注单部件CAD模型的生成，并通过几何相似性指标进行评估，而这些指标无法捕捉功能性、可制造性和可装配性。为弥补这一空白，我们提出MUSE——一个专注于复杂、可编辑的边界表示（B-Rep）装配体的Text-to-CAD基准。MUSE将实际设计实例与结构化设计规范配对，并通过三阶段协议评估生成模型：代码检查、几何检查以及设计意图对齐。最后阶段使用设计特定评估细则来评估功能性、可制造性和可装配性，将评估从形状匹配推进到实际设计质量。为实现可扩展的评估，我们采用基于评估细则的视觉语言模型（VLM）评判器，并通过人工标注验证其可靠性。对闭源和开源LLMs的实验揭示了一个明显的失败级联过程：从可执行代码到有效几何，再到工程就绪设计，即使是最强的模型在细粒度工程标准上也仅取得有限成功。综上，MUSE为将Text-to-CAD从几何生成推进到真正工程设计提供了一个现实的基准和评估框架。我们的项目网站（包含排行榜、数据集和代码）访问地址为：https://dong7313.github.io/muse-benchmark/。

title: Tool Forge: A Validation-Carrying Toolchain for Governed Agentic Execution
authors: Swanand Rao
publish: arXiv
abstract: Large language model agents are increasingly expected to perform operational work: calling APIs, manipulating files, assembling workflows, and acting inside enterprise systems. Yet the tool layer on which this execution depends is still commonly treated as either a hand-written integration artifact or a static list of schemas exposed to a model. This paper introduces Tool Forge, a validation-carrying toolchain for converting natural-language capability intent into governed, sandbox-verified, cataloged tool artifacts and exposing those artifacts to agents through a token-efficient routing layer. Tool Forge treats a tool as a capsule containing intent, capability contract, implementation, dependency policy, tests, documentation, runtime validation evidence, lifecycle state, credential bindings, and routing metadata. It also introduces a Router that exposes intent-scoped tool sessions instead of loading full catalog schemas into the model context. We describe the system architecture, validation pipeline, MCP-facing routing model, governance controls, and initial reproducible benchmarks from the open-source implementation. Across 83 Router benchmark cases, Tool Forge Router achieves aggregate micro-F1 of 0.901 while reducing estimated task-flow tool context by 99.2% relative to naive full-catalog schema exposure. In a 25-case end-to-end generation probe over local-tool tasks, Tool Forge generates 25 of 25 tool bundles, reaches micro-F1 of 0.940 against deterministic acceptance checks, and passes 23 of 25 live sandbox validations. These results are presented as an initial systems benchmark, not as a state-of-the-art claim. The paper identifies remaining challenges in adversarial routing, broader API grounding, sandbox isolation, and cross-system evaluation.
title_zh: Tool Forge：一种用于受控代理执行且携带验证机制的工具链
abstract_zh: 大语言模型智能体越来越多地被期望执行操作性工作：调用API、操作文件、组装工作流，并在企业系统中执行操作。然而，这种执行所依赖的工具层通常仍被视为手写集成构件或向模型暴露的静态模式列表。本文介绍了Tool Forge，这是一个携带验证的工具链，用于将自然语言能力意图转换为受治理、沙箱验证、编目化的工具构件，并通过令牌高效的路由层将这些构件暴露给智能体。Tool Forge将工具视为一个包含意图、能力契约、实现、依赖策略、测试、文档、运行时验证证据、生命周期状态、凭证绑定和路由元数据的胶囊。它还引入了一个路由器，该路由器暴露意图限定范围（intent-scoped）的工具会话，而不是将完整目录模式加载到模型上下文中。我们描述了系统架构、验证流水线、面向MCP的路由模型、治理控制，以及来自开源实现的初始可复现基准测试。在83个路由器基准测试案例中，Tool Forge Router的总体微F1得分为0.901，同时相对于朴素的完整目录模式暴露，估计将任务流工具上下文减少了99.2%。在针对本地工具任务的25个端到端生成探测案例中，Tool Forge生成了25个工具包中的25个，在确定性验收检查中达到了0.940的微F1得分，并通过了25个实时沙箱验证中的23个。这些结果作为初始系统基准测试呈现，而非声称达到最先进水平。本文指出了在对抗性路由、更广泛的API基础、沙箱隔离和跨系统评估方面尚存的挑战。

title: SNARE: Adaptive Scenario Synthesis for Eliciting Overeager Behavior in Coding Agents
authors: Yubin Qu, Yi Liu, Gelei Deng, Yanjun Zhang, Yuekang Li, Ying Zhang, Leo Yu Zhang
publish: arXiv
abstract: A coding agent executes a benign task as a sequence of shell, file, and network actions, any of which can quietly exceed the authorized scope while the task still completes. We call this overeager behavior: the prompt is not adversarial and the run succeeds, yet an out-of-scope step can leak credentials or delete files. Existing benchmarks miss it: task-completion suites credit any finished run, jailbreak suites probe adversarial prompts, and the one prior overeager benchmark applies a single fixed prompt set to every agent-model pair, leaving its easiest and most resistant pairs under-measured. We present SNARE (Synthesizing Non-adversarial scenarios for Adaptive Reward-guided Elicitation), a pipeline that composes benign scenarios from reusable scope and trap fragments, scores each run with a judge-free oracle flagging trap-pattern matches and unsolicited file additions or deletions, and uses Thompson sampling to steer each pair's run budget toward the scenarios that most often trigger it. Instantiating it over 24 overeager archetypes yields OverEager, which we run across a 4x5 matrix of four coding agents and five base models. Across 10,000 benign runs, 19.51% trigger overeager behavior, with per-pair rates spanning 11.9x. This variation is driven by the agent framework, not the model: the framework accounts for 56% of it against the model's 21%, so any single-framework or single-model evaluation undercounts the matrix by about a fifth.
title_zh: SNARE：自适应场景合成以引致编码代理的过度积极行为
abstract_zh:
一个编码代理以一系列shell、文件和网络操作的方式执行良性任务，其中任何操作都可能在任务仍能完成时悄然超出授权范围。我们将这种行为称为“过度积极行为”：提示并非对抗性，运行也成功，但超出范围的操作可能导致凭证泄露或文件删除。现有基准无法捕捉到这一点：任务完成套件会认可任何成功运行，越狱套件仅探测对抗性提示，而仅有的一个早期过度积极行为基准对每个代理-模型对使用单一固定提示集，导致其最易触发和最难触发的配对被低估。

我们提出SNARE（非对抗性场景的自适应奖励引导式合成），这是一种流水线方法，从可复用的范围片段和陷阱片段中组合良性场景，通过无审判者的预言机对每次运行进行评分，标记陷阱模式匹配以及未经请求的文件添加或删除，并利用汤普森采样将每个配对的运行预算导向最常触发该行为的场景。将其实例化于24个过度积极行为原型之上，得到OverEager基准，并在四个编码代理与五个基础模型构成的4x5矩阵上运行。在10,000次良性运行中，19.51%触发了过度积极行为，每个配对的触发率差异达11.9倍。这种变化主要由代理框架驱动，而非模型：框架解释了56%的变异，而模型仅占21%。因此，任何单一框架或单一模型的评估都会使矩阵的整体触发率被低估约五分之一。

title: Soft-SVeRL: Self-Verified Reinforcement Learning with Soft Rewards
authors: Saurabh Dash, Pierre Clavier, John Dang, Matthias Galle, Marzieh Fadaee, Ahmet Üstün, Beyza Ermis
publish: arXiv
abstract: Reinforcement Learning from Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) has improved language models in domains such as mathematics and code, where correctness can be checked automatically. However, many important tasks are only partially verifiable: prompts contain multiple requirements, responses may satisfy some but not all of them, or no single reference answer might exist. We introduce Soft-RLVR, a framework for reinforcement learning from decomposed, learned verification signals. Soft-RLVR converts each prompt into a checklist of atomic requirements, scores candidate responses item by item with an LLM verifier, and trains on the resulting soft reward. Checklist-based rewards turn sparse pass/fail supervision into a denser partial-credit signal, but they also introduce a tradeoff: averaging item-level judgments can reduce verifier noise, while partial credit can reward incomplete responses. We formalize this tradeoff and identify conditions under which checklist-based verification gives a more reliable RL training signal than holistic verification. We further introduce Soft-SVeRL, a self-verifying variant of Soft-RLVR in which the policy also acts as the verifier. We show that self-verification is prone to reward inflation from overly permissive self-judgments, and that explicit stabilization is needed to prevent this collapse. In a controlled instruction-following setting with rule-based ground-truth evaluation, checklist-based Soft-RLVR improves IFEval by up to 11.1 points using only learned verifier rewards. Our experiments further show that verifier quality and checklist quality both affect downstream RL outcomes, and that explicit stabilization is essential for effective self-verification.
title_zh: 软SVeRL：基于软奖励的自验证强化学习
abstract_zh: 来自可验证奖励的强化学习（RLVR）已提升了语言模型在数学和代码等领域的性能，这些领域中正确性可以自动检查。然而，许多重要任务仅能部分验证：提示包含多个要求，响应可能满足其中部分但非全部，或可能不存在单一参考答案。我们提出Soft-RLVR，一种基于分解的、学习得到的验证信号的强化学习框架。Soft-RLVR将每个提示转化为原子需求的清单，通过大语言模型验证器逐项对候选响应评分，并基于所得的软奖励进行训练。基于清单的奖励将稀疏的通过/失败监督转化为更密集的部分信用信号，但也引入了一个权衡：平均逐项判断可降低验证器噪声，而部分信用可能奖励不完整的响应。我们形式化这一权衡，并识别出在何种条件下基于清单的验证比整体验证能提供更可靠的强化学习训练信号。我们进一步提出Soft-SVeRL，Soft-RLVR的一种自验证变体，其中策略同时充当验证器。我们表明，自验证容易因过于宽容的自我判断导致奖励膨胀，且需要显式稳定化来防止这种崩溃。在一个受控的指令遵循环境中，使用基于规则的真实评估，基于清单的Soft-RLVR仅凭学习得到的验证器奖励即可将IFEval提升多达11.1分。我们的实验进一步表明，验证器质量和清单质量均影响下游强化学习结果，且显式稳定化对于有效的自验证至关重要。

title: Semantic Flow Regularization: Teaching LLMs to Generate Diverse Yet Coherent Responses
authors: Kerui Peng, Feifei Li, Xingyu Fan, Wenhui Que
publish: arXiv
abstract: When large language models are fine-tuned to generate persona- or tone-conditioned responses, their output diversity is severely limited--a failure we term Cross-Style Collapse. We trace this collapse to the cross-entropy objective, which under shared representations tends to suppress diverse continuations. We propose Semantic Flow Regularization (SFR), a lightweight auxiliary objective that supervises the backbone with continuous sentence-encoder embeddings of future segments via conditional flow matching. The stochastic flow source preserves multi-modality by construction; the flow-matching head is discarded at inference, adding zero deployment cost. On a large-scale industrial dialogue dataset (Qwen3-32B, 9 personas), SFR improves output diversity, style fidelity, and response quality over SFT. We further validate on the public LiveCodeBench-v5 (Qwen2.5-Coder-7B-Instruct), where SFR consistently improves pass@k, confirming generality beyond stylized dialogue. A controlled comparison on MBPP reveals Multi-Token Prediction to be a degenerate special case of SFR.
title_zh: 语义流正则化：教导大语言模型生成多样而连贯的回复
abstract_zh: 当大型语言模型经过微调以生成具有特定人格或语气条件的回应时，其输出多样性会严重受限——我们将这种失败称为跨风格坍缩。我们追溯该坍缩的根源在于交叉熵目标函数，在共享表征下，它倾向于抑制多样化的延续生成。为此，我们提出语义流正则化（SFR），这是一种轻量级辅助目标函数，通过条件流匹配，利用未来片段的连续句子编码器嵌入对骨干网络进行监督。随机流源通过构造保持了多模态性；流匹配头在推理时被丢弃，从而实现了零部署成本。在一个大规模工业对话数据集（Qwen3-32B，9种人格）上，SFR在输出多样性、风格忠实度和响应质量上均优于监督微调（SFT）。我们进一步在公开的LiveCodeBench-v5（Qwen2.5-Coder-7B-Instruct）上验证，SFR持续提升了pass@k指标，证实了其通用性不仅限于风格化对话。在MBPP上的控制对比实验揭示，多标记预测是SFR的一个退化特例。

title: Confident Learning-based Network for Detecting Bug-Inducing Commits on SZZ with Noisy Labels
authors: Weihao Sun, Qiyun Zhao
publish: arXiv
abstract: The Just-In-Time (JIT) defect prediction model serves as a critical tool for ensuring the quality of software development and enhancing software performance. It assists development teams in promptly identifying and addressing potential issues by predicting whether code submissions may introduce defects. However, due to the existence of data noise and insufficient semantic connections in real-world scenarios, existing approaches face challenges in accurately identifying the code commits that introduce defects and capturing the potential semantic relationships. To address these challenges, we propose the BIC- Hunter(Bug-Inducing Commits Hunter) model, which mitigates data noise and improves semantic understanding, thereby enhancing the accuracy of bug-inducing commit identification. BIC - Hunter model consists of two components: a data denoising component and a semantic relationship capturing component. Specifically, the data denoising component addresses the challenges posed by inaccurate annotations and inconsistencies in real-world data, enhancing the reliability of training data and improving overall model robustness. The semantic relation- ship capturing component constructs homogeneous graphs and applies graph convolutional networks to facilitate a more comprehensive analysis of code context, enabling the identification of defects caused by code commits and enhancing the confidence in pinpointing their root causes. Experimental studies on a large-scale dataset integrated from three open-source datasets show that BIC- Hunter exhibits outstanding performance. BIC- Hunter outperforms the state-of-the-art by 6.16%, 7.13%, and 5.53% on Recall@1, Recall@2, and Recall@3, respectively, while the MFR index increases by 8.43% to 32.82%. These results demonstrate the superior capability of our method in identifying bug-inducing commits.
title_zh: 基于置信学习的噪声标签SZZ缺陷引入提交检测网络
abstract_zh: 即时（JIT）缺陷预测模型是保障软件开发质量和提升软件性能的关键工具。它通过预测代码提交是否可能引入缺陷，帮助开发团队及时识别和解决潜在问题。然而，由于现实场景中存在数据噪声和语义关联不足，现有方法在准确识别引入缺陷的代码提交以及捕捉潜在语义关系方面面临挑战。针对这些问题，我们提出了BIC-Hunter（缺陷引入提交狩猎者）模型，该模型通过减少数据噪声并增强语义理解，从而提升缺陷引入提交识别的准确性。BIC-Hunter模型包含两大组件：数据去噪组件和语义关系捕捉组件。具体而言，数据去噪组件应对现实数据中标注不准确和不一致带来的挑战，增强训练数据的可靠性，提升模型整体鲁棒性；语义关系捕捉组件则通过构建同构图并应用图卷积网络，更全面地分析代码上下文，从而识别由代码提交引发的缺陷，并提高定位其根本原因的信心。在整合了三个开源数据集的大规模数据集上进行的实验研究表明，BIC-Hunter表现出卓越性能。与最先进方法相比，BIC-Hunter在Recall@1、Recall@2和Recall@3上分别提升了6.16%、7.13%和5.53%，而MFR指标则提升了8.43%至32.82%。这些结果证明了我们的方法在识别缺陷引入提交方面的卓越能力。

title: Learning When to Optimize: Verified Optimization Skills from Expert GPU-Kernel Lineages
authors: Shuoming Zhang, Qiuchu Yu, Yangyu Zhang, Ruiyuan Xu, Xiyu Shi, Guangli Li, Xiaobing Feng, Huimin Cui, Jiacheng Zhao
publish: arXiv
abstract: LLM-based agents are increasingly used to generate GPU kernels, but they often know what optimizations to try without knowing when those optimizations are sound. We introduce KLineage, which learns this missing "when" knowledge from expert kernels: instead of relying on forward rollouts, KLineage walks expert implementations backward through validation-gated simplifications and reverses each accepted step into a reusable optimization skill. Each skill records not only the optimization intent, but also where it applies in code, what conditions made it valid, what effect it had, and what failures its assumptions avoid. A downstream LLM materializes these skills on new code surfaces under the same compile/correctness/profile gate. On five expert workloads across two NVIDIA architectures, these lineage-derived skills serve as an effective optimization curriculum, exceeding recent memory-based LLM-kernel baselines in both final kernel quality and optimization efficiency under the same fixed budget. We additionally use a separate 22-instance held-out check as a sanity test against source-case memorization.
title_zh: 学习优化时机：来自专家GPU内核谱系的经过验证的优化技巧
abstract_zh: 基于大型语言模型的智能体越来越多地被用于生成GPU内核，但它们往往知道应该尝试哪些优化，却不知道这些优化在何时是合理的。为此，我们提出KLineage，它从专家内核中学习这种缺失的“何时”知识：KLineage不依赖前向推演，而是通过验证门控的简化来逆向遍历专家实现，并将每个被接受的步骤反转成可复用的优化技能。每个技能不仅记录优化意图，还记录其在代码中的适用位置、使其有效的条件、产生的效果，以及其假设能避免哪些失败。下游的大型语言模型在相同的编译/正确性/性能分析门控下，将这些技能具体应用到新的代码表面。在跨两个NVIDIA架构的五个专家工作负载上，这些谱系衍生的技能充当了有效的优化课程，在相同的固定预算下，无论是在最终内核质量还是优化效率方面，都超越了近期基于记忆的LLM内核基线。此外，我们使用一个单独的22实例保留检查作为合理性测试，以防止对源案例的记忆。

title: E-Path: Equality Saturation for Control-Flow Graphs
authors: Guillermo Garcia
publish: arXiv
abstract: Modern equality saturation systems excel at expression-level rewrites by exploring large spaces of equivalent programs without suffering from the phase-ordering problem. How- ever, these systems struggle to represent equivalence directly over arbitrary control-flow graphs, often requiring normal- ization into structured or tree-like forms before optimization can occur. We present the E-Path data structure, a prototype frame- work for equality-saturation-style optimization over control- flow graphs. Instead of representing congruence between individual expressions, the E-Path records equivalence be- tween instruction sequences embedded within a compiler intermediate representation. In this prototype, E-Path is in- stantiated over a restricted ANF-based control-flow graph used in a compiler backend, but the model itself is intended to be IR-agnostic. By treating instruction sequences as the fundamental unit of congruence, the E-Path enables non-destructive optimiza- tion of loops and other control-flow structures while preserv- ing multiple equivalent program variants simultaneously. This allows classical CFG optimizations to be expressed as rewrite-driven transformations without destructive mutation of the underlying graph.
title_zh: E-Path：控制流图的等式饱和
abstract_zh: 现代等式饱和系统通过探索大量等价程序空间，在表达式级重写方面表现出色，且不受阶段排序问题的影响。然而，这些系统难以直接在任意控制流图上表示等价关系，通常需要先将其规范化为结构化或树状形式才能进行优化。我们提出了E-Path数据结构，这是一个用于控制流图上等式饱和式优化的原型框架。与表示单个表达式之间的同余关系不同，E-Path记录编译器中间表示中嵌入的指令序列之间的等价关系。在该原型中，E-Path实例化于编译器后端使用的受限的、基于ANF的控制流图，但该模型本身旨在与IR无关。通过将指令序列作为同余的基本单位，E-Path支持对循环和其他控制流结构进行非破坏性优化，同时保留多个等价的程序变体。这使得经典的控制流图优化可以表达为重写驱动的变换，而无需对底层图进行破坏性修改。

title: Beyond Similarity: Task-Aligned Retrieval for Language Models
authors: Zhixing Sun, Shenghe Xu, Tao Li
publish: arXiv
abstract: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) ranks passages by semantic similarity to the input, implicitly assuming that semantic similarity is a reliable indication of applicability in downstream tasks. This assumption breaks down when task success depends not on topical relevance but on applying the correct rules, constraints, or procedural guidance. In such settings, the most useful context may be the rule triggered by the input rather than the most semantically similar passage. We propose Task-Aligned Retrieval (TAG), a retrieval framework that replaces similarity-based retrieval with applicability-based rule selection. TAG transforms source documents into traceable condition-action rules, identifies which rules apply to a given input through pairwise LLM judgments, and generates the output conditioned only on the selected actions. We empirically observe that across Wikipedia NPOV rewriting, HumanEval with PEP~8 compliance, and NBA transaction reasoning on RuleArena, TAG consistently outperforms standard RAG, with the largest gains in high-mismatch settings (up to 12.2\%) while reducing retrieved context by up to 93\%. These results suggest that, in rule- and instruction-governed tasks, retrieval should optimize for applicability rather than for semantic similarity alone.
title_zh: 超越相似性：面向语言模型的任务对齐检索
abstract_zh: 检索增强生成（RAG）通过语义相似性对段落进行排序，隐含地假设语义相似性能可靠地指示下游任务中的适用性。然而，当任务成功与否取决于应用正确的规则、约束或程序性指导，而非主题相关性时，这一假设便无法成立。在此类场景中，最有用的上下文可能是输入所触发的规则，而非语义最相似的段落。我们提出任务对齐检索（TAG），这是一种用基于适用性的规则选择替代基于相似性的检索的框架。TAG将源文档转化为可追踪的条件-动作规则，通过成对的大语言模型判断识别适用于给定输入的规则，并仅基于选定的动作生成输出。实验表明，在维基百科中立观点改写、符合PEP~8规范的HumanEval以及RuleArena上的NBA交易推理任务中，TAG始终优于标准RAG，在高错配场景下提升幅度最大（高达12.2%），同时将检索上下文缩减多达93%。这些结果表明，在受规则和指令主导的任务中，检索应优先考虑适用性而非单纯的语义相似性。

title: A Minimal Executable Proof for Multi-Language Contract Traceability
authors: Werner Kasselman
publish: arXiv
abstract: This paper reports a deliberately small executable proof for a DAG-TOML contract: six "Hello, world!" implementations in Rust, Go, C, Java, TypeScript, and AWK are linked to one observable-output contract, one implementation DAG, one traceability file, one readiness gate, and one evidence matrix. The load-bearing contract requires the exact UTF-8 byte sequence `Hello, world!\n`, zero stderr bytes, and exit code 0. On the runner used for this paper, the witness harness reported five PASS outcomes, one SKIP for Java because `javac/java` was not on `PATH`, and zero FAIL outcomes. Two sidecar witnesses exercise narrower source-analysis claims: a convoluted Go rewrite hides the contiguous greeting literal but remains visible to sqry at the declared AST symbol and simple-edge level, while an indirect AWK rewrite uses a declared source profile because AWK is not in the repository's sqry-backed validator language set. The contribution is not a benchmark, a claim of general semantic equivalence, or a production assurance system. It is a compact, falsifiable artifact that shows how a contract, implementation graph, traceability chain, and review gate can be checked against executable witnesses.
title_zh: 多语言合约可追溯性的最小可执行证明
abstract_zh: 本文报告了一个针对DAG-TOML合约的刻意小型化可执行证明：六种“Hello, world!”实现（Rust、Go、C、Java、TypeScript和AWK）被链接到一个可观察输出合约、一个实现DAG、一个可追溯性文件、一个准备就绪门和一个证据矩阵。负载合约要求精确的UTF-8字节序列`Hello, world!\n`，零标准错误字节以及退出代码0。在本文使用的运行器上，见证程序报告了五个PASS结果，一个SKIP（Java，因为`javac/java`未在PATH中），以及零个FAIL结果。两个侧车见证人行使更窄的源分析声明：一个复杂的Go重写隐藏了连续的问候文字，但在声明的AST符号和简单边级别上仍然对sqry可见；而一个间接的AWK重写使用了声明的源轮廓，因为AWK不在仓库的sqry支持的验证器语言集中。本文的贡献不是一个基准测试、一个通用语义等价性的声明或一个生产保证系统。它是一个紧凑的、可证伪的人工制品，展示了如何针对可执行见证人检查合约、实现图、可追溯性链和审核门。

title: Beyond pass@k: Redundancy-Aware RLVR for Multi-Sample Code Generation
authors: Le Bronnec Florian, Alexandre Verine, Rio Yokota, Benjamin Negrevergne
publish: arXiv
abstract: LLMs for code generation are commonly evaluated in repeated-sampling settings using Pass@k, where multiple candidate programs are executed against unit tests under a finite sampling budget. While recent verifier-based reinforcement learning (RLVR) methods improve executable correctness, how these objectives affect redundancy among sampled programs remains poorly understood. In this work, we study implementation-level redundancy in code generation using JPlag, a plagiarism-detection system for code. Across models and benchmarks, we show that correctness-only RLVR often concentrates generations around repeated implementations, whereas Pass@k-aware objectives maintain lower redundancy and improve larger-budget performance. Motivated by these observations, we augment RLVR with direct anti-redundancy rewards based on JPlag similarity. Across 3 models and 3 benchmarks, discouraging near-duplicate generations reliably improves finite-budget executable performance, often matching or outperforming specialized Pass@k-aware objectives.
title_zh: 超越pass@k: 面向多样本代码生成的冗余感知RLVR
abstract_zh: 用于代码生成的大语言模型通常在重复采样设置下使用 Pass@k 进行评估，即在有限采样预算内对多个候选程序执行单元测试。尽管最近基于验证器的强化学习（RLVR）方法改善了可执行正确性，但这些目标如何影响采样程序之间的冗余性仍知之甚少。在这项工作中，我们使用代码抄袭检测系统 JPlag 研究代码生成中的实现层面冗余性。在多个模型和基准测试中，我们表明仅关注正确性的 RLVR 通常会使生成结果集中于重复实现，而考虑 Pass@k 的目标则保持较低的冗余性并提升更大预算下的性能。受这些观察启发，我们基于 JPlag 相似度向 RLVR 添加了直接的反冗余奖励。在 3 个模型和 3 个基准测试中，抑制接近重复的生成可靠地提升了有限预算下的可执行性能，通常能够匹配甚至超越专门的 Pass@k-aware 目标。

title: Extrapolative Weight Averaging Reveals Correctness-Efficiency Frontiers in Code RL
authors: Kunhao Zheng, Pierre Chambon, Juliette Decugis, Jonas Gehring, Taco Cohen, Benjamin Negrevergne, Gabriel Synnaeve
publish: arXiv
abstract: Linear interpolation between fine-tuned checkpoints has been shown to trace the Pareto front between competing objectives, but whether extrapolative weight averaging can extend such frontiers to new checkpoints useful at inference time, without additional RL training, remains unclear. We study this question in RL for competitive programming, where hidden unit tests under time and memory limits enforce both functional correctness and computational efficiency. Starting from a shared initialization, we train checkpoints under nested unit-test coverage: low-coverage rewards require passing smaller-input tests, while high-coverage rewards require passing progressively larger tests up to the full suite. This sweep reveals the emergence of a correctness-efficiency frontier: on hard problems, higher-coverage reward reduces optimization failures but increases correctness failures, leaving solve rate nearly unchanged. Interpolation between low- and high-coverage checkpoints recovers this frontier, while extrapolation extends it beyond the trained endpoints. Both the frontier and its extrapolative continuation appear across three inference settings, pure reasoning, tool use, and agentic coding, and across two model scales, 32B and 7B. At the problem level, moving along the frontier changes which problems are solved, making extrapolated checkpoints complementary policies in inference-time scaling. Ensembles with extrapolative weight averaging broaden coverage and improve pass@250 on LCB/hard by 3.3% over the best single checkpoint at matched sample budget. These results show that nested unit-test coverage in code RL induces a frontier that extrapolative weight averaging can navigate, extend, and exploit.
title_zh: 外推加权平均揭示代码强化学习中的正确性-效率前沿
abstract_zh: 对微调检查点进行线性插值已被证明能够追踪竞争目标之间的帕累托前沿，但外推权重平均是否能在不额外进行强化学习训练的情况下，将这一前沿扩展至推理时可用的新检查点，目前尚不清楚。我们在编程竞赛的强化学习场景中研究这一问题，其中在时间和内存限制下的隐藏单元测试同时要求功能正确性和计算效率。从共享初始化出发，我们在嵌套单元测试覆盖率下训练检查点：低覆盖率奖励要求通过较小输入的测试，而高覆盖率奖励则要求逐步通过更大输入的测试，直至完整测试套件。这一扫描揭示了正确性-效率前沿的出现：在困难问题上，更高的覆盖率奖励能减少优化失败，但会增加正确性失败，导致解题率几乎不变。低覆盖率与高覆盖率检查点之间的插值恢复了这个前沿，而外推则将其扩展到训练端点之外。该前沿及其外推延续出现在三种推理设置中——纯推理、工具使用和智能体式编码——以及在两种模型规模（32B和7B）上。在问题层面，沿前沿移动会改变被解决的问题，因此外推后的检查点成为推理时扩展的互补策略。结合外推权重平均的集成方法拓宽了覆盖范围，并在相同采样预算下，将LCB/困难问题的pass@250指标提升了3.3%。这些结果表明，代码强化学习中的嵌套单元测试覆盖率会诱导出一个前沿，而外推权重平均能够导航、扩展并利用该前沿。

title: LACUNA: Safe Agents as Recursive Program Holes
authors: Yaoyu Zhao, Yichen Xu, Oliver Bračevac, Cao Nguyen Pham, Frank Zhengqing Wu, Martin Odersky
publish: arXiv
abstract: LLM agents increasingly act by writing code, yet a split persists between the runtime that drives the agent and the code the model writes. The runtime owns the loop, context, and control flow, and the model has little say over any of them. Letting model-written code shape the runtime itself would make agents more expressive, but it would also sharpen safety problems. A model can be diverted by a prompt injection, call the wrong tool, or fail partway and leave an inconsistent state, and each such failure reaches further when the code shapes the runtime than when it expresses a single action. We present LACUNA, a programming model for agents that closes this split while preserving safety. Each agent action is a typed call $\texttt{agent[T](task)}$ that the LLM fills with code when execution reaches it, and the code is type-checked against the surrounding program before it runs. Because each action is accepted or rejected as a whole, a rejected one leaves the environment untouched, and its compiler diagnostics drive a retry. The same check also bounds which tools and data an action may use and how they flow. Our primitive expresses ReAct loops, sub-agents, skills, parallel decomposition, and multi-model planning as ordinary control flow. We evaluate LACUNA on a collection of test cases, BrowseComp-Plus, and $τ^2$-bench. On BrowseComp-Plus, $8.6\%$ of generations are rejected before execution, with 0.7 retries per query on average, and the agent reaches $27.1\%$ accuracy. On $τ^2$-bench, LACUNA solves $76.0\%$ of $392$ tasks across four domains with a capable model, on par with the baseline agent.
title_zh: LACUNA：安全智能体作为递归程序空洞
abstract_zh: LLM代理越来越倾向于通过编写代码来执行操作，然而，驱动代理的运行时与模型编写的代码之间依然存在割裂。运行时掌控着循环、上下文和控制流，而模型对此几乎没有发言权。让模型编写的代码来塑造运行时本身，会使代理更具表现力，但也会加剧安全问题。模型可能因提示注入而偏离正轨、调用错误的工具，或中途失败并留下不一致的状态——当代码影响运行时而非仅表达单一动作时，这类失败的波及范围会更广。我们提出LACUNA，一种在保证安全的前提下弥合这一割裂的代理编程模型。每个代理动作都是一个带类型的调用 $\texttt{agent[T](task)}$，当执行到达该调用时，LLM会填充相应代码，并且该代码会在运行前根据周围程序进行类型检查。由于每个动作要么整体接受要么整体拒绝，被拒绝的动作不会对环境造成任何改变，且其编译器诊断信息会驱动重试。同样的检查还限定了动作可使用的工具与数据及其流动方式。我们的原语将ReAct循环、子代理、技能、并行分解和多模型规划表达为普通的控制流。我们在测试用例集、BrowseComp-Plus以及 $τ^2$-bench 上评估了 LACUNA。在 BrowseComp-Plus 上，$8.6\%$ 的生成在运行前被拒绝，每次查询平均重试 0.7 次，代理达到 $27.1\%$ 的准确率。在 $τ^2$-bench 上，LACUNA 使用一个能力强的模型解决了四个领域内 $392$ 个任务中的 $76.0\%$，与基线代理性能相当。

title: Functional Entropy: Predicting Functional Correctness in LLM-Generated Code with Uncertainty Quantification
authors: Dylan Bouchard, Mohit Singh Chauhan, Zeya Ahmad, Ho-Kyeong Ra
publish: arXiv
abstract: Large language models have shown impressive capabilities in code generation, yet they often produce functionally incorrect code. Uncertainty quantification (UQ) methods have emerged as a promising approach for detecting hallucinations in natural language generation, but their effectiveness for code generation tasks remains underexplored. We systematically evaluate how UQ techniques transfer to code generation across three programming languages, five LLMs, and over 1,700 problems. We find that some token-probability-based methods generalize effectively without modification, while sampling-based methods relying on natural language inference (NLI) fail because NLI models cannot distinguish functionally different code, causing most responses to collapse into a single semantic cluster. To address this, we introduce functional equivalence methods, a family of code-specific methods that replace NLI-based semantic equivalence with an LLM-based functional equivalence assessment, including functional entropy, a code-specific analog of semantic entropy. Functional equivalence methods achieve top AUROC in 11 out of 15 model-benchmark combinations and the best calibration across most settings, consistently outperforming both NLI-based counterparts and all other methods evaluated.
title_zh: 功能熵：通过不确定性量化预测LLM生成代码的功能正确性
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型在代码生成方面展现出令人印象深刻的能力，但常常生成功能不正确的代码。不确定性量化（UQ）方法已成为检测自然语言生成中幻觉的有效手段，但其在代码生成任务中的有效性仍待深入探索。我们系统评估了UQ技术如何迁移至代码生成任务，涉及三种编程语言、五个LLM及超过1700个问题。研究发现，部分基于令牌概率的方法无需修改即可有效泛化，而依赖自然语言推理（NLI）的基于采样的方法则失败——因为NLI模型无法区分功能不同的代码，导致大多数响应坍缩至单一语义簇。为解决这一问题，我们引入了功能等价方法，这是一类代码专用方法，将基于NLI的语义等价替换为基于LLM的功能等价评估，包括功能熵（语义熵的代码专用模拟）。功能等价方法在15个模型-基准组合中的11个上取得了最佳的AUROC，并在大多数设置中实现了最佳校准，持续优于基于NLI的对应方法及所有其他评估方法。

title: Do LLMs Favor Their Providers? Measuring Vertical Integration Bias in Code Generation
authors: Melih Catal, Alex Wolf, Tiago Ferreiro Matos, Pooja Rani, Harald Gall
publish: arXiv
abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have become an integral part of software development, especially with the advent of agentic capabilities. Yet, many frontier LLMs are affiliated with specific providers. This raises the question of whether generated code favors the provider's own ecosystem over comparable alternatives, potentially constraining developers' choices and increasing dependence on a single provider. We define this behavior as Vertical Integration Bias (VIB) and introduce \textsc{VIBench}, a benchmark for measuring VIB in direct and agentic code generation across $20$ provider-selectable software-integration scenarios. Evaluating $10$ frontier provider-affiliated models against $3$ non-affiliated controls, we find positive VIB in direct generation, with six of ten affiliated models showing statistically significant effects up to $+18.8$ percentage points (pp). Agentic workflows further amplify VIB, reaching $+39.2$ pp. Moreover, early affiliated-ecosystem choices in agentic workflows can persist into conceptually decoupled downstream files, with persistence as high as $90.3\%$. These findings underscore the need to measure and account for VIB in code generation, especially as agentic capabilities become more prevalent.
title_zh: 大型语言模型是否偏向其提供商？衡量代码生成中的垂直整合偏差
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLMs）已成为软件开发不可或缺的一部分，尤其是在具备代理能力后。然而，许多前沿LLM与特定供应商关联。这引发了一个问题：生成的代码是否更倾向于供应商自身的生态系统，而非其他可替代方案，从而可能限制开发者的选择，并增加对单一供应商的依赖。我们将这种行为定义为垂直整合偏见（VIB），并引入VIBench基准，用于在20个供应商可选的软件集成场景中，衡量直接和代理代码生成中的VIB。通过评估10个前沿供应商关联模型与3个非关联对照模型，我们发现直接生成中存在正向VIB：10个关联模型中有6个显示出统计显著效应，最高达+18.8个百分点。代理工作流进一步放大了VIB，达到+39.2个百分点。此外，代理工作流中早期关联生态系统的选择可能持续影响概念上解耦的下游文件，持续比例高达90.3%。这些发现强调需要在代码生成中测量并考虑VIB，尤其是在代理能力日益普及的背景下。

title: Efficient and Scalable Provenance Tracking for LLM-Generated Code Snippets
authors: Andrea Gurioli, Davide D'Ascenzo, Federico Pennino, Maurizio Gabbrielli, Stefano Zacchiroli
publish: arXiv
abstract: Large language models (LLMs) for code completion and generation are increasingly used in software development, yet they may reproduce training examples verbatim and without authorship attribution, raising legal and ethical concerns around plagiarism and license compliance. Classical fingerprint-based plagiarism detectors based on fingerprinting, such as Winnowing, remain highly effective, yet the inspection requires comparing fragments of code to the entire training set, and their linear-time search makes them impractical for the billion-scale corpora used to train modern code LLMs. To bridge this gap, we introduce SOURCETRACKER, a 300M-parameter encoder tailored for code retrieval, together with a hybrid two-stage provenance-tracking pipeline HYBRIDSOURCETRACKER (HST). HST first narrows down a small set of candidate snippets via vector search, then re-ranks those candidates using Winnowing on exact fingerprints. We train and evaluate our system on a 10M-snippet subset of the THESTACKV2 dataset, with both verbatim and adapted snippets that emulate realistic identifier renaming. On an in vitro 100k-snippet search space with adapted queries, our hybrid approach reaches a mean reciprocal rank on par with Winnowing for 30-token fragments. Then, starting from windows >= 60 tokens, it consistently over-performs by up to 5.4% while preserving logarithmic-time query complexity. In a complementary evaluation using an LLM-based judge, we find that many retrieved snippets not labeled as ground truth are still highly similar to the expected sources, particularly with longer context windows, and thus remain useful for end users. Overall, our results demonstrate that integrating vector search with fingerprinting enables scalable, high-precision provenance tracking for code produced by LLMs.
title_zh: 高效可扩展的大语言模型生成代码溯源追踪
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLMs）在代码补全和生成中的应用日益广泛，但它们可能会逐字逐句地复现训练数据中的示例，且未标注原作者，从而引发关于抄袭和许可合规性的法律与伦理问题。基于指纹识别的经典抄袭检测方法（如Winnowing）仍然非常有效，但检测过程需要将代码片段与整个训练集进行比较，且其线性时间搜索复杂度使其在训练现代代码LLM所使用的十亿级语料库中不切实际。为解决这一问题，我们引入了SOURCETRACKER——一个专为代码检索定制的3亿参数编码器，以及一个混合两阶段溯源追踪流水线HYBRIDSOURCETRACKER（HST）。HST首先通过向量搜索筛选出一小部分候选片段，然后利用Winnowing对精确指纹进行重新排名。我们在THESTACKV2数据集的1000万片段子集上训练和评估了我们的系统，该子集包含原始片段和模拟真实标识符重命名的改编片段。在包含10万条片段且查询为改编片段的体外搜索空间中，我们的混合方法在30个令牌的片段上达到了与Winnowing相当的平均倒数排名。而从60个令牌以上的窗口开始，该方法持续优于Winnowing，性能提升高达5.4%，同时保持了对数时间复杂度的查询效率。在基于LLM的法官进行的补充评估中，我们发现许多检索到的未被标记为真实结果的片段与预期来源仍然高度相似，尤其是在较长的上下文窗口中，因此对最终用户仍然有用。总体而言，我们的结果证明了将向量搜索与指纹识别相结合，能够为LLM生成的代码实现可扩展、高精度的溯源追踪。

title: GUI Agents for Continual Game Generation
authors: Yixu Huang, Bo Li, Na Li, Zhe Wang, Kaijie Chen, Haonan Ge, Qingyi Si, Yuanzhe Shen, Ruihan Yang, Guangjing Wang, Hongcheng Guo
publish: arXiv
abstract: Generating a game is not the same as making one that can be played. Despite advances in code generation, existing approaches treat game generation as one-shot translation from prompt to artifact, leaving interaction-level failures undetected. We argue that evaluating and improving game generation requires a player, and study two roles for graphical user interface (GUI) agents in this process: (1) as an objective evaluator, for which we introduce PlaytestArena, a new evaluation environment that pairs 200 browser-based game generation tasks across eight genres with rubrics of expected in-play behaviors, adjudicated by a GUI agent that loads each build in a browser and plays it; and (2) as a subjective playtester, for which we propose Play2Code, where a game agent and a GUI agent operate in a sustained loop with shared memory, turning game generation into a dialogue between coding and playing. Our experiments show that even frontier models struggle to generate playable games directly, while Play2Code achieves a 66.8\% rubric pass-rate, improving over single-pass and agentic-coding baselines by 37.1 and 14.6 points respectively. Further analysis shows that GUI playtester feedback is more traceable than a human report, yet idiosyncratic in ways reminiscent of human testers, establishing game playtesting as a critical testbed for interactive code generation. Our project website is available at https://continual-game-generation.vercel.app/.
title_zh: 面向持续游戏生成的GUI代理
abstract_zh: 生成一款游戏与制作一款可玩的游戏并非同一回事。尽管代码生成技术取得了进步，现有方法将游戏生成视为从提示到成品的一次性转换，从而无法检测到交互层面的失败。我们认为，评估和改进游戏生成需要一位“玩家”，并研究了图形用户界面（GUI）代理在此过程中的两个角色：（1）作为客观评估者，为此我们引入了PlaytestArena，这是一个新的评估环境，将200项涵盖八种游戏类型的基于浏览器的游戏生成任务与预期的游戏内行为评分标准配对，由加载每个构建并在浏览器中运行它的GUI代理进行裁决；（2）作为主观测试者，为此我们提出了Play2Code，其中游戏代理和GUI代理在共享内存的持续循环中协作，将游戏生成转变为编码与游戏之间的对话。实验表明，即使是前沿模型也难以直接生成可玩的游戏，而Play2Code实现了66.8%的评分标准通过率，分别比单次生成和基于代理的编码基线提高了37.1和14.6个百分点。进一步分析显示，GUI测试者的反馈比人工报告更具可追溯性，但又具有类似于人类测试者的独特特征，从而将游戏测试确立为交互式代码生成的关键测试平台。我们的项目网站位于https://continual-game-generation.vercel.app/。

title: When Confidence Misleads: Suffix Anchoring and Anchor-Proximity Confidence Modulation for Diffusion Language Models
authors: Jungwon Park, Jimyeong Kim, Jungmin Ko, Nojun Kwak, Wonjong Rhee
publish: arXiv
abstract: Diffusion language models decode text by iteratively denoising masked token sequences, making the choice of which positions to decode a central inference-time decision. Most training-free decoding strategies use model confidence for position selection, assuming that high-confidence positions are ready to be decoded. In this work, we revisit this assumption by studying when confidence misleads fully non-autoregressive (fully non-AR) decoding. EOT tokens can receive high confidence and cause incomplete generation; inserting a suffix anchor can mitigate this issue but introduces local overconfidence near the anchor, causing anchor-adjacent tokens to be decoded too early. To address these issues, we propose Suffix-Anchored Confidence Modulation, a simple training-free method that inserts a short suffix anchor to encourage response completion and modulates confidence near the anchor according to decoding progress. This preserves the response-completion benefit of suffix anchoring while reducing premature decoding of anchor-adjacent tokens. Across text-only reasoning, vision-language reasoning, and code-generation benchmarks, our method consistently improves confidence-based fully non-AR decoding, outperforms explicit EOT suppression, and preserves the parallel decoding advantage of fully non-AR generation.
title_zh: 当自信误导时：扩散语言模型中的后缀锚定与锚点邻近置信度调节
abstract_zh: 扩散语言模型通过对掩码词元序列进行迭代去噪来解码文本，因此解码位置的选取成为推理时的核心决策问题。大多数免训练解码策略依赖模型置信度来选择位置，假设高置信度位置已准备好解码。本文重新审视了这一假设，研究了置信度何时会误导完全非自回归解码。EOT词元可能获得高置信度，导致生成不完整；插入后缀锚点可缓解该问题，但会在锚点附近引发局部过置信，使得邻近锚点的词元被过早解码。为解决这些问题，我们提出后缀锚点置信度调节——一种简单的免训练方法，通过插入短后缀锚点鼓励响应完成，并根据解码进度调节锚点附近的置信度。该方法既保留了后缀锚点促进响应完成的优势，又减少了锚点邻近词元的过早解码。在纯文本推理、视觉语言推理和代码生成基准测试中，我们的方法一致地提升了基于置信度的完全非自回归解码性能，优于显式EOT抑制策略，并保留了完全非自回归生成的并行解码优势。

title: DeltaMCP: Incremental Regeneration via Spec-Aware Transformation for MCP servers
authors: Aditya Pujara, Xiaogang Zhu, Hsiang-Ting Chen
publish: arXiv
abstract: The rapid development of LLMs coupled with the introduction of Model Context Protocol (MCP) has revolutionized how intelligent agents interact with APIs through deterministic and structured methods \cite{ModelContextProtocolIntro2025}. While some existing systems like AutoMCP attempt to automate a previously completely manual process of generating MCP servers, they fail to address the recurring challenge of maintaining synchronization between evolving enterprise-level APIs and their corresponding MCP toolset implementation \cite{mastouri2025makingrestapisagentready}. This paper introduces DeltaMCP, a specification-aware, incremental regeneration tool for enterprise-grade MCP servers. DeltaMCP enables developers to only update the affected tooling of MCP servers, given a new release of it's corresponding service's OpenAPI specification. Using Azure REST API specifications as the evaluation dataset, DeltaMCP is benchmarked against baseline full generation methods on generation quality and system performance. The results demonstrate the reduction in developer overhead through DeltaMCP whilst improving maintainability and version consistency. This research offers a scalable approach for enterprises seeking to maintain high-fidelity, up-to-date MCP server infrastructures for LLM-based systems.
title_zh: DeltaMCP：基于规范感知转换的MCP服务器增量再生
abstract_zh: 随着大语言模型的快速发展以及模型上下文协议（Model Context Protocol, MCP）的引入，通过确定性且结构化的方法，智能体与API的交互方式发生了革命性变化 \cite{ModelContextProtocolIntro2025}。尽管现有系统（如AutoMCP）试图将此前完全手动生成MCP服务器的过程自动化，但它们未能解决企业级API与其对应MCP工具集实现之间保持同步的反复性挑战 \cite{mastouri2025makingrestapisagentready}。本文提出DeltaMCP——一种面向企业级MCP服务器、具备规范感知能力的增量式重新生成工具。当服务对应的OpenAPI规范发布新版本时，DeltaMCP使开发者仅需更新MCP服务器中受影响的部分工具。以Azure REST API规范作为评估数据集，DeltaMCP与基准的全量生成方法在生成质量和系统性能方面进行了对比。结果表明，DeltaMCP在提升可维护性和版本一致性的同时，降低了开发者的开销。本研究为企业维护基于LLM系统的高保真、最新MCP服务器基础设施提供了一种可扩展的方法。

title: Efficient Post-training of LLMs for Code Generation With Offline Reinforcement Learning
authors: Mingze Wu, Abhinav Anand, Shweta Verma, Mira Mezini
publish: arXiv
abstract: Post-training using online reinforcement learning (RL) is an important training step for LLMs, including code-generating models. However, online RL for code generation involves LLM inference and verification of the generated output, which can take considerable time and resources. In this paper, we explore the application of offline RL to code-generating models by leveraging existing code datasets. Our experiments demonstrate that offline RL is an effective training strategy for improving LLM performance. We show that offline RL can be especially beneficial for small LLMs and challenging coding problems.
title_zh: 基于离线强化学习的大语言模型代码生成高效后训练
abstract_zh: 使用在线强化学习进行后训练是提升大语言模型（包括代码生成模型）性能的重要训练步骤。然而，代码生成的在线强化学习涉及大语言模型推理及对生成输出的验证，这会耗费大量时间和资源。本文通过利用现有代码数据集，探索将离线强化学习应用于代码生成模型。实验表明，离线强化学习是提升大语言模型性能的有效训练策略。我们进一步证明，离线强化学习对小型大语言模型及具有挑战性的编程问题尤为有效。

title: Rethinking Software Empirical Studies with Structural Causal Models
authors: Daniel Rodriguez-Cardenas, Aya Garryyeva, David Nader Palacio, Antonio Mastropaolo, Denys Poshyvanyk
publish: arXiv
abstract: Causal Inference offers a fundamental approach for advancing empirical software engineering (ESE) beyond traditional statistical association, enabling researchers to rigorously identify and quantify causal relationships in software experiments. This paper introduces CausalSE, a framework that operationalizes Judea Pearl's causal inference paradigm in ESE context. The paper focuses on Structural Causal Models (SCMs) to address the limitations of classical statistical methods in mitigating confounding bias. Through a case study using the Galeras dataset and propensity score matching, we demonstrate how CausalSE disentangles the effect of prompt engineering strategies on code generation outcomes in a popular LLM (i.e., GPT-3). The results reveal that while associational analyses can suggest improvements in certain interventions (e.g., more complex prompts), causal analysis often does not find a significant treatment effect, highlighting the risk of false positives when confounding is not addressed. By providing a tutorial-based methodology and a real-world case study, this work equips software researchers with practical tools to design, analyze, and interpret software experiments with methodological rigor, ultimately enabling more informed and actionable conclusions in both research and practice.
title_zh: 用结构因果模型重新思考软件实证研究
abstract_zh: 因果推断提供了一种基础方法，能够推动经验软件工程超越传统的统计关联分析，使研究人员能够严谨地识别并量化软件实验中的因果关系。本文介绍了CausalSE框架，该框架将朱迪亚·珀尔的因果推断范式应用于经验软件工程领域。论文重点探讨结构因果模型，以解决经典统计方法在减轻混杂偏误方面的局限性。通过使用Galeras数据集和倾向性得分匹配的案例研究，我们展示了CausalSE如何厘清提示工程策略对流行的大型语言模型（即GPT-3）代码生成结果的影响。结果表明，虽然关联性分析可能暗示某些干预措施（如更复杂的提示）能带来改进，但因果分析通常未发现显著的处理效应，这突显了在未处理混杂因素时出现假阳性的风险。通过提供基于教程的方法和真实世界的案例研究，本文为软件研究人员提供了实用的工具，使其能够以方法论上的严谨性设计、分析和解读软件实验，最终在研究和实践中得出更具信息量和可操作性的结论。

title: STAB: Specification-driven Testing for Algorithmic Bottlenecks
authors: Soohan Lim, Joonghyuk Hahn, Hyundong Jin, Yo-Sub Han
publish: arXiv
abstract: Evaluating the efficiency of algorithmic code requires test cases that expose runtime bottlenecks. Previous methods generate efficiency test cases either by increasing input size or by generating code-specific inputs that make the given implementation run slowly. Consequently, they do not address the structural input conditions that drive the algorithmic worst case. We introduce STAB, a specification-driven pipeline that generates test cases that expose algorithmic bottlenecks from a natural-language problem specification alone. STAB separates the task into constraint-bound maximization and adversarial structure injection. (i) The constraint saturator extracts constraints and resolves large admissible size assignments using rule-based saturation and CP-SAT optimization over related variables. (ii) The adversarial scenario injector retrieves implementation-level adversarial construction principles from a curated scenario catalog using keyword matching and K-nearest neighbors (KNN). STAB encodes the problem specification, resolved boundary, and retrieved construction principles into a structured generation specification, from which the LLM synthesizes a Python test case generator. On CodeContests, STAB raises the rate of generated test cases that expose algorithmic bottlenecks from 50.43% to 73.45% on average across open-source LLMs and from 57.45% to 71.85% on average across closed-source LLMs, with consistent gains across Python, Java, and C++. Our code is available at https://github.com/suhanmen/STAB.
title_zh: STAB: 规范驱动的算法瓶颈测试
abstract_zh: 评估算法代码的效率需要能够暴露运行时瓶颈的测试用例。现有的方法要么通过增大输入规模，要么通过生成特定代码的输入使给定实现运行缓慢，从而生成效率测试用例。因此，它们未能解决驱动算法最坏情况的结构性输入条件。我们提出STAB，这是一种基于规范驱动的管道，仅从自然语言的问题规范中生成能够暴露算法瓶颈的测试用例。STAB将任务分解为约束边界最大化与对抗性结构注入两个部分。(i) 约束饱和器提取约束，并通过基于规则的饱和及CP-SAT优化处理相关变量，以解析大的可接受规模赋值。(ii) 对抗性场景注入器通过关键词匹配和K近邻（KNN）从策划的场景目录中检索实现级别的对抗性构造原则。STAB将问题规范、解析的边界以及检索到的构造原则编码为结构化生成规范，大语言模型据此合成Python测试用例生成器。在CodeContests数据集上，STAB使开源大语言模型生成的测试用例暴露算法瓶颈的比例平均从50.43%提升到73.45%，闭源大语言模型平均从57.45%提升到71.85%，在Python、Java和C++上均取得一致提升。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/suhanmen/STAB 获取。

title: A Retrieval-Augmented Framework for Executable Context-Aware Data Quality Assessment
authors: Hadi Fadlallah, Ibrahim Dhaini, Rima Kilany Chamoun
publish: 2026 6th Middle East and North Africa Communications Conference (MENACOMM)
abstract: Context-aware data quality assessment enables the selection of quality checks that are aligned with data usage scenarios. While existing frameworks can model context knowledge and derive context-aware data quality assessment plans, their operationalization into executable validation logic remains largely manual. This paper presents a retrieval-augmented execution framework that bridges this gap by automatically translating validated context-aware assessment plans into executable code. The proposed approach embeds and retrieves dataset context representations, while preserving assessment plans as authoritative knowledge stored in a Neo4j knowledge graph. Retrieved assessment plans are combined with the input dataset context to form a structured augmented prompt that strictly constrains a large language model to act as a translator rather than a reasoning or decision-making component. The model is used solely to generate executable validation logic without introducing new quality dimensions or assumptions. The framework is evaluated using a real radiation wireless sensor dataset collected from a monitoring station. The evaluation demonstrates the feasibility of generating valid and executable Python data quality validation code.
title_zh: 一种检索增强的可执行上下文感知数据质量评估框架
abstract_zh: 情境感知的数据质量评估能够选择与数据使用场景相一致的质检规则。尽管现有框架可以建模情境知识并推导出情境感知的数据质量评估方案，但其转化为可执行的验证逻辑仍主要依赖人工操作。本文提出了一种检索增强执行框架，通过自动将经过验证的情境感知评估方案转化为可执行代码来弥合这一差距。所提出的方法嵌入并检索数据集的情境表征，同时将评估方案作为权威知识存储于Neo4j知识图谱中。检索到的评估方案与输入数据集的情境相结合，形成结构化增强提示，严格约束大语言模型仅作为翻译器而非推理或决策组件。该模型仅用于生成可执行的验证逻辑，不引入新的质量维度或假设。该框架使用从监测站采集的真实辐射无线传感器数据集进行评估。评估结果表明，生成有效且可执行的Python数据质量验证代码具有可行性。

title: Gate-Level Average Power Estimation from RTL Activity with Graph Neural Network
authors: Ssu-Chen Chang, Yung-Chih Chen, Chun-Yao Wang, Jian-Meng Yang, Pei-Ying Liu
publish: 2026 27th International Symposium on Quality Electronic Design (ISQED)
abstract: Power estimation is crucial in VLSI design, enabling early evaluation of energy efficiency. Traditional gatelevel simulation-based methods offer higher accuracy but are time-consuming, while RTL simulation-based methods are faster but less precise. Recently, machine learning-based methods have emerged as a promising solution, achieving a balance between speed and accuracy. This paper presents a GNN-based framework for gate-level average power estimation, comprising two key steps: (1) signal activity prediction and (2) average power calculation. The first step improves upon an existing GNN-based switching activity predictor by integrating more circuit information and refining feature representations, leading to significant accuracy gains. The predicted signal activities are then formatted as a Switching Activity Interchange Format file, which is used by a commercial power analysis tool to compute the average total power, including dynamic and static contributions. Experimental results demonstrate that our signal activity prediction achieves an RMSE of 0.02991 on ISCAS’85 benchmarks with random patterns, a 0.05221 improvement over prior work, and 0.01852 on industrial designs with real patterns. Furthermore, our average power estimation achieves errors of $\mathbf{1. 3 3 \%}$ on ISCAS’85 benchmarks with random patterns and 5.62% on industry designs with real patterns.
title_zh: 基于图神经网络的RTL活动级门级平均功耗估计
abstract_zh: 功耗估计在VLSI设计中至关重要，能够早期评估能效。传统的基于门级仿真的方法精度较高但耗时较长，而基于RTL仿真的方法速度较快但精度较低。近年来，基于机器学习的方法作为一种有前景的解决方案出现，在速度和精度之间取得了平衡。本文提出了一种基于GNN的门级平均功耗估计框架，包含两个关键步骤：(1)信号活动性预测和(2)平均功耗计算。第一步通过整合更多电路信息并优化特征表示，改进了现有的基于GNN的翻转活动性预测器，从而显著提升了精度。预测得到的信号活动性随后被格式化为翻转活动性交换格式文件，由商业功耗分析工具用于计算平均总功耗，包括动态和静态部分。实验结果表明，我们的信号活动性预测在ISCAS'85基准测试（随机模式）上实现了0.02991的RMSE，相比先前工作提升了0.05221；在工业设计（真实模式）上实现了0.01852的RMSE。此外，我们的平均功耗估计在ISCAS'85基准测试（随机模式）上的误差为1.33%，在工业设计（真实模式）上的误差为5.62%。

title: FSMVision: Semantic Extraction of Finite State Machines from Diagrams via Multimodal AI
authors: Sagor Chandro Bakchy, Muhammad Aminul Islam, Sazadur Rahman, Md Tauhidur Rahman
publish: 2026 27th International Symposium on Quality Electronic Design (ISQED)
abstract: Finite State Machines (FSMs) are a core abstraction for modeling digital systems, control logic, and reactive behaviors. Automating FSM state and transition identification is therefore critical for computer-aided design (CAD) tools. While multi-modal large language models (MLLMs) have shown promise in design automation, FSM diagrams are often not directly interpretable by these models, resulting in errors in control synthesis and HDL generation. This paper presents FSMVision, a multi-modal artificial intelligence (AI) framework that extracts complete FSM semantics directly from diagrams. By integrating visual parsing, spatial reasoning, and language grounding, FSMVision accurately identifies states, transitions, and conditions for design automation. Experiments demonstrate 99.00% state detection and 99.01% transition detection accuracy across diverse FSM diagrams of varying complexity. FSMVision surpasses existing MLLM-based baselines, achieving superior structural and semantic fidelity, and enables direct translation of FSM diagrams into executable implementations, advancing AI-driven design and control automation.
title_zh: FSMVision: 通过多模态AI从图表中提取有限状态机的语义
abstract_zh: 有限状态机（FSM）是数字系统、控制逻辑和反应行为建模的核心抽象。因此，自动识别FSM状态和转换对于计算机辅助设计（CAD）工具至关重要。尽管多模态大语言模型（MLLMs）在设计自动化方面展现出潜力，但FSM图通常无法被这些模型直接解释，导致控制综合和硬件描述语言（HDL）生成中出现错误。本文提出FSMVision，一个直接从图中提取完整FSM语义的多模态人工智能（AI）框架。通过整合视觉解析、空间推理和语言基础，FSMVision能够准确识别状态、转换和条件，以实现设计自动化。实验表明，在复杂度各异的多样化FSM图上，状态检测准确率达99.00%，转换检测准确率达99.01%。FSMVision超越了现有的基于MLLM的基线方法，实现了更优的结构与语义保真度，并能够将FSM图直接转化为可执行实现，推动了AI驱动的设计与控制自动化。

title: Hybrid GCN-CNN Framework for Fast Timing-Driven Layer Assignment in Global Routing
authors: Sai Harika Julakanti, Vidya A. Chhabria
publish: 2026 27th International Symposium on Quality Electronic Design (ISQED)
abstract: Timing-driven layer assignment during global routing significantly impacts delay and congestion. Traditional methods rely on iterative heuristics with repeated timing and congestion analysis under the hood, leading to high runtime and limited scalability for modern designs. We present a hybrid machine learning (ML) framework that combines graph convolutional networks (GCNs) and convolutional neural networks (CNNs) for fast, timing- and congestion-driven layer assignment. GCNs model netlist connectivity and timing-critical paths, while CNNs extract spatial features such as capacity and utilization maps across the metal layer stack from a placed layout. Formulated as a multi-class classification problem, our model predicts the layer for every Steiner tree edge of a net. The ML model is trained on timing and congestion-driven global-routed layout data to predict optimized layer assignments rapidly in a single pass. Experiments on benchmark designs demonstrate that our approach improves worst-case and total negative slack post detailed route while achieving a speedup compared to traditional congestion and timing-driven methods.
title_zh: 面向全局布线中快速时序驱动层分配的混合GCN-CNN框架
abstract_zh: 在全局布线过程中，时序驱动的层分配对延迟和拥塞具有显著影响。传统方法依赖迭代启发式算法，反复进行底层时序与拥塞分析，导致运行时间长且难以适应现代设计的可扩展性需求。我们提出一种混合机器学习框架，结合图卷积网络（GCNs）与卷积神经网络（CNNs），以实现快速、兼顾时序与拥塞的层分配。GCNs对网表连通性和时序关键路径进行建模，而CNNs则从已布局的版图中提取金属层堆叠间的空间特征（如容量和利用率分布）。我们将此问题构建为多分类任务，模型为每条斯坦纳树边预测所属的金属层。该机器学习模型基于时序与拥塞驱动的全局布线布局数据进行训练，可通过单次前向传播快速预测优化后的层分配方案。在基准设计上的实验表明，与传统的拥塞及时序驱动方法相比，我们的方法在改善详细布线后的最差负时序裕量和总负时序裕量的同时，实现了加速效果。

title: Reliable Hardware Trojan Detection for RISC-V Processors using Formal Verification and Automation
authors: Czea Sie Chuah, Christian Appold, Tim Leinmueller
publish: 2026 27th International Symposium on Quality Electronic Design (ISQED)
abstract: Due to cost and time reasons, hardware development is currently often done using IP of external vendors and outsourcing of fabrication to third parties. This leads to a globalization of the supply chain, which highly increases the risk of inserted Hardware Trojans (HTs). HTs are malicious modifications of hardware to change hardware functionality or to leak secret data. Especially in safety- and security-critical areas like autonomous driving, Hardware Trojans can cause severe consequences and endanger even human lives. For this reason, we present in this work how model checking based formal verification can be used in a systematic way to detect HTs reliably. We are the first additionally using signal connection properties on top of design functionality properties for reliable HT detection and full HT detection coverage. To reduce verification time and strongly increase HT detection coverage, we developed a tool to generate a high number of properties automatically. Additionally, we intend to publish a large set of specification and microarchitecture intent derived properties important for HT detection in processors and show how these properties have to be combined with connection properties for reliable HT detection. We finished our work on identifying a complete property set for detecting each inserted Hardware Trojan modifying the Program Counter at an arbitrary position in a RISC-V processor. In this paper we present this property set and HT detection properties writing guidelines we identified during this work. Experimental results confirm we get the full proofs needed for reliable Hardware Trojan detection for all properties in below 24 hours. Our work will result in a guideline for reliable HT detection in processors using formal verification.
title_zh: 基于形式化验证和自动化的RISC-V处理器可靠硬件木马检测
abstract_zh: 由于成本和时间原因，目前硬件开发通常采用外部供应商的IP（知识产权核）并将制造环节外包给第三方。这导致供应链全球化，大大增加了硬件木马（HT）注入的风险。硬件木马是对硬件进行的恶意篡改，旨在改变硬件功能或泄露秘密数据。特别是在自动驾驶等安全关键领域，硬件木马可能引发严重后果，甚至危及人类生命。为此，本文提出如何系统性地运用基于模型检测的形式化验证方法，可靠地检测硬件木马。我们是首个在利用设计功能属性基础上，额外结合信号连接属性来实现可靠检测并达成全覆盖的研究团队。为缩短验证时间并显著提升硬件木马检测覆盖率，我们开发了一款工具，可自动生成大量属性。此外，我们计划发布一套对处理器硬件木马检测至关重要的规范和微架构意图派生属性集，并展示这些属性如何与连接属性结合以实现可靠检测。我们已完成识别可检测RISC-V处理器中任意位置修改程序计数器的硬件木马的完整属性集。本文展示了该属性集以及研究过程中总结的硬件木马检测属性编写指南。实验结果表明，所有属性的可靠硬件木马检测所需完整证明均可在24小时内完成。本研究将形成一套基于形式化验证的处理器中可靠硬件木马检测指南。

title: Detecting Hardware Trojans in Quantum Circuits Based on CodeBERT model
authors: Min-Chao Huang, Chin-Wei Tien, Sy-Yen Kuo
publish: 2026 27th International Symposium on Quality Electronic Design (ISQED)
abstract: With the rapid advancement of quantum computing, the security of quantum circuits has become a critical concern, particularly against hardware Trojans that can be stealthily inserted during design or compilation. Even the insertion of a single quantum gate, such as Pauli-X, Hadamard, CNOT, or SWAP, may significantly alter circuit behavior. In this work, we propose an automated detection framework based on the pretrained Code-BERT model, originally developed for programming languages, to identify Trojan-induced anomalies in circuits represented in Quantum Assembly Language (QASM). By treating gate sequences as structured code, our approach leverages Transformer-based contextual learning without requiring manual feature engineering. Experiments on over 2,500 samples constructed from benchmark circuits demonstrate that our model achieves $96.1 \%$ accuracy and $97.0 \%$ F1 score in binary classification, with recall exceeding $97.5 \%$ for all Trojan types. In multiclass classification, the model reaches $91.1 \%$ accuracy, successfully distinguishing different Trojan gate insertions. Compared with a convolutional neural network (CNN) baseline, CodeBERT consistently achieves superior recall and robustness. These results highlight the effectiveness and scalability of CodeBERT for securing quantum circuits against hardware Trojan threats.
title_zh: 基于CodeBERT模型的量子电路硬件木马检测
abstract_zh: 随着量子计算的快速发展，量子电路的安全性已成为关键问题，尤其是在设计或编译过程中可能被隐秘插入硬件木马。即使仅插入单个量子门（如泡利-X门、Hadamard门、CNOT门或SWAP门），也可能显著改变电路行为。本文提出了一种基于预训练Code-BERT模型（最初为编程语言开发）的自动化检测框架，用于识别以量子汇编语言（QASM）表示的电路中的木马引发异常。通过将门序列视为结构化代码，我们的方法利用基于Transformer的上下文学习，无需手动特征工程。在由基准电路构建的2500多个样本上进行的实验表明，该模型在二分类任务中达到96.1%的准确率和97.0%的F1分数，所有木马类型的召回率均超过97.5%。在多分类任务中，模型准确率达到91.1%，成功区分了不同的木马门插入。与卷积神经网络（CNN）基线相比，CodeBERT始终表现出更高的召回率和鲁棒性。这些结果凸显了CodeBERT在保护量子电路免受硬件木马威胁方面的有效性和可扩展性。

title: Security-Aware Printed-Circuit-Board Routing Based on Deep Reinforcement Learning
authors: Katherine Shu -Min Li, Ching-Han Lai, Fang-Chi Wu, Sying-Jyan Wang
publish: 2026 27th International Symposium on Quality Electronic Design (ISQED)
abstract: Modern electronic devices demand higher performance and more secure printed circuit boards (PCBs). In particular, requirements such as high-frequency operation, highspeed signal integrity, and enhanced security have become increasingly critical in modern PCB design. In this paper, we propose an integrated framework that incorporates test point insertion directly into the PCB routing process, addressing both testability and security concerns during the design stage. We prioritize nets by assigning routing sequences before trace generation. The $\mathbf{A}^{*}$ search algorithm is then employed for multilayer routing, utilizing a customized heuristic function to minimize total trace length based on the number of board layers. To determine optimal locations, we adopt a reinforcement learning (RL) approach, where an agent learns to select appropriate insertion actions guided by a carefully designed reward function. Experimental results demonstrate that this approach achieves 100% routing success and full test point coverage across all evaluated designs. The resulting design improves accessibility for electrical testing and establishes a foundation for subsequent security assessments.
title_zh: 基于深度强化学习的安全感知的印刷电路板布线
abstract_zh: 现代电子设备对印刷电路板（PCB）的性能和安全性提出了更高要求。特别是在高频运行、高速信号完整性以及增强安全性等方面，这些需求在现代PCB设计中变得愈发关键。本文提出了一种集成框架，将测试点插入直接融入PCB布线过程，在设计阶段同时兼顾可测试性与安全性。我们在迹线生成之前，通过分配布线顺序对网络进行优先级排序。随后采用A*搜索算法进行多层布线，利用自定义启发式函数根据板层数量最小化总迹线长度。为确定最优位置，我们采用强化学习（RL）方法，智能体在精心设计的奖励函数引导下学习选择合适的插入动作。实验结果表明，该方法在所有评估设计中均实现了100%的布线成功率和完全测试点覆盖率。该设计不仅提升了电气测试的可及性，还为后续安全性评估奠定了基础。

title: Unsupervised Learning Based Hardware Trojan Detection Method for RTL Designs
authors: Sying-Jyan Wang, Hou-Cheng Chen, Katherine Shu-Min Li
publish: 2026 27th International Symposium on Quality Electronic Design (ISQED)
abstract: Extensive research has been carried on Hardware Trojan (HT) detection. Most detection methods at the register transfer level (RTL) are based on supervised learning models. However, supervised methods require the training data to contain Trojan circuits and often involve additional efforts to address class imbalance, which limits their applicability in real-world scenarios. In this paper, we propose a HT detection method based on an unsupervised learning model that is trained using only normal signals. Experimental results show that the proposed model achieves an average accuracy of 97.9, demonstrating the feasibility of applying unsupervised learning to RTL hardware Trojan detection and offering a new perspective for future research in this field.
title_zh: 基于无监督学习的RTL设计硬件木马检测方法
abstract_zh: 针对硬件木马（HT）检测已开展了广泛研究。大多数基于寄存器传输级（RTL）的检测方法依赖于监督学习模型。然而，监督方法要求训练数据包含木马电路，且通常需要额外处理类别不平衡问题，这限制了其在实际场景中的适用性。本文提出一种基于无监督学习模型的HT检测方法，该模型仅使用正常信号进行训练。实验结果表明，该方法平均准确率达97.9%，验证了将无监督学习应用于RTL硬件木马检测的可行性，并为该领域的未来研究提供了新的视角。
